name: HP INC
summary: HP Inc. is a global technology company operating in over 170 countries, offering personal computing devices, printing hardware, supplies, services, and subscriptions. Products include AI PCs, workstations, notebooks, desktops, office and home printers, large-format graphics solutions, and 3D printing systems. HP serves consumers, SMBs, enterprises, and public sector customers through Personal Systems, Printing, and Corporate Investments segments.
